target: 17. Infected from the Beginning…
(The loop before last-- meaning on July 23rd, before I experienced the loops, I heard from Totsumura-san.)
(That Koba Mart still wasn't open at 8 AM, and the entire Kobayakawa family had vanished.)
(...The store is closed, as expected. Damn it... nothing has changed...)
Oh my!! If it isn't Shinpei-kun!
<color=#GF_TIPS_010>Shiomi</color>-san... good morning.
My deepest condolences... It's such a shame about Ushio-chan...
Yes…
...Don't push yourself. Just take it easy until things settle down.
Thank you...
By the way, Shinpei-kun, you're out shopping this early?
Ah… yes.
(Come to think of it, Totsumura-san said it was Shiomi-san who noticed the Kobayakawa family's disappearance...)
This island doesn't have any convenience stores. Must be inconvenient after getting used to Tokyo, huh!?

No… I actually like the selection here.
They even have matcha soft-serve…
Haha! A taste of home, eh!
But it looks like they're closed today...
No, they shouldn't be closed! That's strange~. I haven't heard anything about them taking a day off...
I wonder if something happened. Maybe I'll go take a look.
Ah, then I'll come too. I'm worried about them.
It won't open. Are they not home?
Ah.
What, it is open! Koba-chan, are you here~!?
Sh-Shiomi-san?
Koba-chan, I'm coming in!
Is that okay? Just letting ourselves in...!?
It's fine! Koba-chan~?
Koba-chan~?
(The TV is left on, and the food is untouched... To be blunt, it's way too unnatural...)
Hmm… this is…
(A human-shaped stain on the floor... Just like when Totsumura-san was erased by the Shadow...)
(A Shadow... this is the work of a Shadow!!)
Damn it, I couldn't make it in time!
(I imagined the worst-case scenario, didn't I? There had to be other ways to handle this. There should have been a way to save them...)
(...You idiot! We're dealing with monsters here!? I don't want to get killed again!!)
(All I can do is warn them, and...)
(carefully observe the situation that has unfolded...)
(...And? What can I learn from observing this?)
(The food is completely cold and untouched... Judging by the beer, they were probably attacked yesterday... during dinnertime...)
(What else...)
(Marks on the floor like it's been caved in...? ...Over there too!?)
(There are multiple marks that look like they were smashed with incredible force... What on earth happened here...?)
(...There are two black stains. Judging from their size, they're adults...)
(Most likely, they're Shiori-chan's parents.)
(Then... where did Shiori-chan go!?)
Shiomi-san! I'm going to go check upstairs for a bit!
Oka~~y. I'm counting on you!!
(It's dark... Are the shutters closed?)
The light switch is... over there--
Hey.
(...Th... this voice is...)
Why did you... say that yesterday?
(Something I didn't do at the first or second funeral, but did for the first time at the third--)
(That was... telling Shiori-chan about the Shadows...)
You were staring right at me... Was there something on my face?
Or is there something weird about my body?
(...It's... confirmed...)
(The Shadow that slipped into Ushio's funeral... Its true identity was... <color=#GF_TIPS_005>Shiori Kobayakawa</color>...)
Y... your voice is coming out... Did you get... better?
(...I'm such an idiot. What a stupid question...)
…Ah…
My mom and dad... told me to stay quiet... More importantly, about my question--
…Well, whatever.
Even if you don't answer, I'll ask you later...
(That Shadow-- It's the same as when one took over Totsumura-san...!)
(Just like Totsumura-san, there's a Shadow that looks exactly like me...?)
(I've been infected by the Shadow Sickness... No... I was already infected!)
(Ever since the first funeral, <color=#GF_KEY_SNP_KANSEN>over and over</color>...!)
Shinpei-ku~n?
What's wrong!? Was someone up there?
(She disappeared...!?)
What happened?
Ah... no, um...
(The door behind where the Shadow was is open... Is she... in there...?)

That's the toilet, right?
Did you get a stomachache?
Ah, no. I'm fine...
(No one's here... The window is open, but... Could she have squeezed out through a gap like that?)
(Anyway... thanks to Shiomi-san, it looks like I just barely escaped with my life...)
